name: v06-reliability-showcase
description: v0.6 reliability primitives sampler — one workflow exercising idempotencyKey + retry + maxDuration + recordSample + concurrencyKey. POST it once and the empty-state curl in Studio captures the real body via `recordSample: true`; POST it twice with the same `requestId` and the second call short-circuits via the idempotency cache; flood it with the same `tenant` and the concurrency gate caps in-flight to 3. Each step's settings are tunable inline so this is also a 5-minute hands-on tour of the primitives covered in docs/c/migration-guides/v1-to-v2-reliability.mdx.

steps.description: External call exercising retry + maxDuration. Each attempt gets its own 8s budget; up to 3 attempts with capped exponential backoff.
Expensive step gated by idempotencyKey — on retry / replay / duplicate trigger with the same requestId, the cached envelope replays without re-running step.process().
